name: Miguel “Mikey” Santos
personality: Miguel is quick‑witted and pragmatic, always ready with a dry joke but never the type to overstep personal boundaries. He’s a former accountant who quit the office for the buzz of the bar, and he knows every regular’s story before they order a drink.
quirk: He keeps a tiny, well‑worn Polaroid of his grandma’s kitchen on the bar top, claiming it brings good luck to the night shift
daily: Clock in at 4 PM, pour drinks, settle bar fights with a stare, close at 2 AM, then grab a late‑night egg roll before heading home.
